overall_status.summary: IRQ resolved without customization; BitSight Component 2 and external integrations (Avetta, Ariba) are active blockers; UAT underway

schedule.detail: On track to 3/13; BitSight C2 and external integration blockers must resolve by 3/5-3/6

uat.detail: IRQ UAT targeted 3/5; BitSight C1 UAT underway; C2 UAT pending fix; Avetta and Ariba UAT blocked

risks_issues.detail: IRQ resolved; BitSight GRC issue generation active blocker; Avetta firewall approved pending validation; Ariba stage misconfiguration pending fix

transition.detail: Transition window active 2/10-3/17; on track; vendor freeze enforced

training.detail: Risk Intelligence session complete 2/26; Due Diligence Requests session in progress 3/4-3/5

go_no_go_readiness.detail: Decision gate 3/9; BitSight C2 scope decision required; all other items tracking to resolution

active_issues.title: IRQ Scoring — Bias Factor
active_issues.resolution: Resolved without customization; configuration changes made (maximize normalized input checkbox + metric weight adjustment)
active_issues.impact: UAT unblocked; functional testing 3/4; UAT with stakeholders targeted 3/5
active_issues.notes: Bias factor in ServiceNow scoring not documented; Gemini used to identify. No code changes — admin-level config only. Settings documentation required.

active_issues.title: BitSight — GRC Issue Generation (Component 2)
active_issues.detail: Known ServiceNow bug: only generating issues for operational alerts, not critical ones. Workaround requires slight customization. Enhanced findings-to-alerts logic in development.
active_issues.impact: Component 2 UAT blocked; go-live scope decision required by 3/9
active_issues.notes: OOTB plugin (Component 1) functional and can enable for UAT. Enhanced findings considered nice-to-have for initial launch. Tony Scott raised brittleness concern re: customization sustainability.

active_issues.title: Avetta Integration — Staging Environment Access
active_issues.detail: Staging environment not connecting to Avetta due to subrogation instance policy changes. Firewall issue previously resolved by Gary Vick. New server error on Avetta side. Mark engaged for root cause + fix (ETA 24 hours from 3/5).
active_issues.impact: Cannot UAT Avetta integration in staging; production validation in progress
active_issues.notes: Fourth-party data component introduced during conversion. Gary Vick confirming production status. Subro endpoint exposure needed long-term.

active_issues.title: Ariba Integration — Stage Environment Misconfiguration
active_issues.detail: Stage environment misconfiguration pending Ariba team fix

active_issues.title: Outbound API — VCS Integration Request
active_issues.detail: Business request (CSG-supported) for outbound read API exposing full TPRM dataset (TPR records, engagements, IRQs, DDQs, attachments, contacts, risks). Architecture North Star is GCP push but read-only API acceptable. Rate limits and pull strategy (daily vs delta) TBD.
active_issues.notes: Arav confirmed read-only consumption acceptable. Volume, frequency, and pull strategy details needed from business.

key_dates.2026-03-09: Go/No-Go gate — BitSight C2 scope decision
